homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.
prompts.1: How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental track features a fast, driving drum beat supported by a pulsating bassline and repetitive synth patterns. The infectious rhythm creates an ideal atmosphere for club or rave environments, reflecting strong influences from EDM and trance styles. Although labeled as hardstyle in some archives, the sound is best described as high-energy techno with prominent electronic instrumentation.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense instrumental track features a fast, driving rhythm propelled by synthesizers and electronic drums. The energetic sound creates an adventurous and retro atmosphere that feels well-suited for a video game boss battle or action sequence. Despite some conflicting genre signals, the composition relies heavily on synthesizer textures to build its dynamic momentum.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features the band M.D.C. performing a live hardcore punk track from their 2002 concert in Belgium. The song delivers a heavy, aggressive sound driven by distorted guitars, loud drums, and a male vocalist with a raspy tone. Its fast tempo and intense energy create a violent atmosphere typical of the genre.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition features a lively brass section with trumpets and trombones, driving forward with a strong rhythmic foundation. The piece exudes a cheerful and upbeat atmosphere that blends retro charm with an uplifting sense of nostalgia. Although presented as a MIDI recreation of Baroque era music, the arrangement focuses on the bold instrumentation rather than vocals or lyrics.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track by Los Repetidores features a cool and groovy funk vibe driven by an electric guitar riff and a simple bassline. The drummer supports the ensemble with a steady rock beat, creating an easygoing atmosphere perfect for a casual outing or road trip. Originally recorded in 2013 as part of an outdoor music cycle, the piece captures a relaxed energy despite its upbeat instrumentation.

questions.name: Sample 8
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is a beautiful example of a game soundtrack, specifically in the style of a Japanese role-playing game. It features a prominent, melancholic piano melody supported by a lush string section that creates a slow and steady rhythm. The overall mood is deeply nostalgic and wistful, making it well-suited for peaceful exploration or reflective cutscenes.

questions.name: Sample 11
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends strong electronic influences with a driving synthesizer lead and a steady drum beat to create an intense, energetic groove. The rhythm is repetitive yet punctuated by occasional glitchy elements, establishing a futuristic atmosphere perfect for racing or action scenes in video games. With its sense of urgency and dynamic layers, the piece captures an adventurous mood that encourages movement on the dance floor.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
